acceptance_criteria_review.q10_text_excludes_q9: Pass. The test asserts q10 content is present and q9 inverse-function text is absent.
acceptance_criteria_review.regenerated_image_smaller_than_stale_can: Pass. The test asserts the generated q10 crop is below 5000px and aspect ratio below 3.0.

test_quality_review: The test uses real repository PDFs and image dimensions, matching the project policy for historical crop failures.
repo_hygiene_review: Only a test file changed. Probe outputs are run-local, but an earlier exploratory command accidentally wrote one generated q10 image under output/ before being corrected.
scope_creep_review: No parser or canonical output rebuild was performed.
regression_risks: The canonical output directory may now contain a repaired q10 image from the accidental exploratory command; a later validation run should treat that as generated-output drift needing explicit manifest handling.
evidence: Visual inspection showed the stale canonical q10 image includes q6-q9 before q10.
Run-local regeneration produced q10 status pass/pass with no q9 text and dimensions 1606x4616.
The focused regression now protects that behavior.
recommended_next_planner_focus: Check whether the next top suspicious candidates are also stale under current code or still reproduce live parser failures.
